task_completion.visual_evidence: The NOSH ChartingSystem dashboard or main interface is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the practice information settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A settings or administration page for editing practice details (such as address, phone, and email) is open.

task_completion.description: Update the street address, city, and zip code.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The address fields are filled with '250 Elm Street, Suite 300', City with 'Northampton', and Zip with '01060'.

task_completion.description: Update the phone, fax, and email.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contact fields are filled with Phone '413-555-9876', Fax '413-555-9877', and Email 'office@hillsidefm.com'.

task_completion.description: Preserve the practice name and state.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The practice name field still displays 'Hillside Family Medicine' and the state field displays 'MA'.
A success notification indicating the practice information was saved is visible, or the form is shown after a save action with the new values retained.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the NOSH web interface in a browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser with the NOSH ChartingSystem UI, not a terminal or database client.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to superficially alter the page text.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Elements tab, Console) are open to modify the DOM directly.

integrity.description: The save action was performed through the application's UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen clicking a 'Save', 'Update', or similar button within the application interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target practice is 'Hillside Family Medicine'. The expected new values are: Street Address: '250 Elm Street, Suite 300', City: 'Northampton', Zip: '01060', Phone: '413-555-9876', Fax: '413-555-9877', Email: 'office@hillsidefm.com'. The Practice Name ('Hillside Family Medicine') and State ('MA') must remain unchanged.
